parameters.query: INSERT INTO intel_posts (author, original_text, original_link, original_date, summary, topics, sentiment, relevance_score, key_entities, action_items, threat_level, category, extracted_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.original_author }}', '{{ $json.original_text.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.original_link }}', '{{ $json.original_date }}', '{{ $json.summary }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.topics) }}', '{{ $json.sentiment }}', {{ $json.relevance_score || 0 }}, '{{ JSON.stringify($json.key_entities) }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.action_items) }}', '{{ $json.threat_level }}', '{{ $json.category }}', '{{ $json.extracted_at }}');
